Recent meta-analyses indicate that cold milk retains more viable epithelial cells and stem cells than saline, enhancing regenerative potential after reimplantation—even beyond initial claims about nutrition alone. These findings suggest that milk’s unique composition contributes directly to better long-term dental outcomes in pediatric cases where timing allows only limited intervention windows.
